creator: jharris@widomaker.com
text:
>   Description
>
>A new ftpcopy version is available, it contains several new features and
>bugfixes. From NEWS:
>
>0.4.5 December 2001

>-MD5 (ftpcopy-0.4.2.tar.gz) = 0b2048457f0c6eb4b7f205bb8b502310
>+MD5 (ftpcopy-0.4.5.tar.gz) = 48b8922897c5d4ae400c38594813a45d

It also seems to be missing compile/compile.sh.  Using the copy from 0.4.2
allowed the build to complete.  (The author should get a CC from this
PR followup.)

FWIW, ncftp3's ncftpls with -l is the only way I've found so far to get
traditional ls output from a standalone program.
